question:
What is the core ethical problem with "gatekeeping" — policing who is or isn't a legitimate member of a subculture or interest group?
A) It is a violation of international copyright law.
B) Subcultures have a legal obligation to remain open to new members at all times.
C) It uses arbitrary criteria to exclude people, prioritizing the gatekeeper's ego over the shared enjoyment that communities are meant to provide.
D) Gatekeeping reliably improves the quality of all subcultures it is applied to.
